runs.note: Fixed authentication to support both MD5 and scrypt password hashes during migration. Added scrypt hashing functions, updated login to verify both hash types and transparently rehash MD5 users to scrypt on successful login, updated password requirements to 10 characters for new registrations and password changes, and ensured new users are created with scrypt hashes.

runs.note: Added scrypt support and transparent rehashing. Users with MD5 hashes can log in and are automatically migrated to scrypt. New registrations use scrypt with 10-char minimum. Pre-migrated scrypt users like dave_migrated can now log in successfully.
